prompt: Ultra-realistic quiet luxury brand magazine cover featuring a refined Korean woman in a head-to-toe Bottega Veneta look — a clay-toned oversized woven leather jacket over a chocolate brown silk blouse — cradling the iconic Bottega Veneta Intrecciato Jodie bag in woven clay leather against her chest with both arms wrapped gently around it, eyes slightly downcast in a contemplative luxury mood.
